subsystem: P9 Pattern Factory + P10 Product Layers (Noetfield sellable patterns & commercial product/service layer)
what_it_is: P9 is a library of sellable, receipt-backed governance PATTERNS (the reusable "features" products are sold on: signal-factory, brain-audit, zero-drift, anti-theater, auto-heal, plus two v1 governance patterns for alive-doc staleness and operational-language). P10 is the commercial "what is sold" layer: entity/product docs (Noetfield parent, SourceA, TrustField-as-separate-venture), full service definitions with tiered pricing (Agentic Cost Governance, Operational Language Audit, Alive-Doc Audit), two live-product blueprints (Sina Gateway, TrustField Partner Access Platform), and venture dictionary overlays. Together they encode the staged commercial ladder: Brain Audit (sells now) -> Zero-Drift proof -> Operating Brain Install -> Managed Brain -> VIP. These are SSOT definition docs; the actual execution machinery (language_gate/, P8-MACHINE-LOOPS, scripts, CF workers) lives OUTSIDE this scope.

current_state.note: Definition layer is rich and current (dated 2026-07-03 to 07-07). Some referenced products are LIVE outside this scope: Sina Gateway (Railway), TrustField Partner Access Platform (trustfield.ca W1-W10 green), SourceA Brain chatbot (CF Worker). But the commercial tiers are STAGED/GATED by the brain-as-a-service proof-gate: Tier-1 audits sell now, Tier-3 Managed Brain is locked until SourceA runs 24/7 with receipts. pattern-factory-index.md self-marks 'Members (TODO to expand)'. Services (agentic-cost-governance) are explicitly pre-launch/pilot. The live language_gate already scans these docs (9 *.language_gate_review.json sidecars present, with open UNDEFINED_TERM warnings on brain-as-a-service.md x8, auto-heal x3, anti-theater x2).

key_assets.purpose: Index + doctrine of sellable patterns; states the commercial ladder and explicitly flags 'Members (TODO to expand)' — the plug-in point for new patterns.
Central commercial doctrine: the staged proof-gate and 4-tier offer ladder (Brain Audit -> Operating Brain Install -> Managed Brain -> VIP), front door = 'Operating Brain Install'.
Tier-1 sellable-NOW offer: diagnoses 7 stack pathologies -> 'Brain Coherence Report + roadmap'. No proof required; fastest cash path. Has no report template yet.

Signal Factory skill spec: fixed triage output contract (classification, 4 scores, next_action, JSON receipt author!=subject). Live as anthropic-skills:signal-factory but 'structural verifier worker-build pending'.

Richest pattern: full machine reference (language_gate artifacts, 7-bucket classification, RC3 receipts 158 files/0 WARN, reusable client checklist). The proven engine behind the language audit product.
Staleness/stale-pointer governance pattern (7 finding classes, repair-queue loop) backing the Alive-Doc Governance Audit product.
First proof module: same-input->same-decision across model swaps; the credibility anchor that unlocks Tier-2. Also anti-theater.md + auto-heal-hospital.md define the other saleable feature-patterns.
Boundary law: Canon governs HOW the system runs; Product layers govern WHAT is sold; they cross-reference but never compete.
Full 5-tier service definition (AI Spend Leak Audit -> Policy Pack -> Firewall Pilot -> ROI Advisory -> Cost Ledger) with pricing bands, explicit non-claims, and Noetfield/SourceA/NOOS role split.

Binding vocabulary + policy rules + ROI metrics table (cost-per-successful-task, leak_rate, policy compliance, premium justification rate) for the cost-governance service — directly implementable metric specs.
Commercial surface for the language pattern: 3 tiers with fixed scope + price bands ($4K-8K audit), proof artifacts, reusable client checklist. Ready-to-sell offer shape.

LOCKED, BUILT & LIVE (Railway) personal gateway: mirror->route->capture->tag wizard, gateway_leads Supabase schema, rule-based priority_tag, and an explicit DEFERRED backlog (scoring engine, admin dashboard, segmentation).
LIVE on trustfield.ca: two partner surfaces + 5-tier GTM ladder (Sandbox -> RPAA Discovery CAD4k -> MSP channel -> Integration Program -> Partner Access), non-negotiable regulatory boundary table.

Venture overlay pattern instance: local terms point to SG canon (never redefine), cross-refs machine index language_gate/sourcea_dictionary_overlay_index_v1.json. Template for new-venture overlays (TrustField draft mirrors it).

Live language-gate sidecar output; one per doc (9 total). Shows open UNDEFINED_TERM queue (System Architect, Brain Coherence Report, Managed Deterministic Brain, etc.) — proof the gate runs on these files and a concrete backlog to clear.

extension_points: pattern-factory-index.md explicitly says 'Members (TODO to expand)' — new patterns plug in as new .md files following the template (definition / proving-ground / receipts / buyer-pain / how-to-sell).

The 9 *.language_gate_review.json sidecars are emitted by the live language_gate pipeline; new/edited docs get scanned and produce UNDEFINED_TERM warnings — a self-refreshing backlog and a place a product-terms overlay plugs in.

Dictionary overlays (SOURCEA_DICTIONARY_OVERLAY_v1, TRUSTFIELD_DICTIONARY_OVERLAY_DRAFT_v1) each point to a machine index (language_gate/*_overlay_index_v1.json); adding a new venture = add an overlay doc + index following the fixed class taxonomy.

Every service doc (agentic-cost-governance, operational-language-audit, alive-doc-audit) exposes an explicit Tier 1-5 ladder with fixed scope + price bands per the UNLOCK doctrine — new tiers/deliverables slot into that ladder.
agentic-cost-governance-SSOT.md defines a concrete vocabulary + policy-rules + ROI-metrics table that audit tooling / policy templates are meant to compute against.
SINA_GATEWAY_BLUEPRINT_LOCKED_v1.md §7 has a named DEFERRED backlog (learned scoring, admin dashboard, segmentation UI, cross-venture matching) that reads exported gateway_leads rows.
signal-factory-v1.md defines a fixed JSON receipt contract and requires a structural verifier (author!=subject) that is marked 'worker-build pending'.
brain-audit-v1.md enumerates 7 diagnostic categories for the 'Brain Coherence Report' but no report template/rubric exists yet.

buildable_ideas.idea: Build a static HTML Pattern Factory catalog / storefront page that renders all 7 patterns and their matching commercial surfaces (buyer pain, tier, price band, proof receipts, ladder position) pulled from the P9 pattern docs + P10 service docs. Directly answers the index's 'TODO to expand' and fits the founder-law that deliverables are simple web pages, not decks.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: pattern-factory-index.md + brain-as-a-service.md ladder + operational-language-governance-audit.md / agentic-cost-governance-service.md pricing

buildable_ideas.idea: Create a NOETFIELD_PRODUCT_DICTIONARY_OVERLAY (+ machine index) following the SourceA/TrustField overlay pattern to classify the commercial/product terms the live language_gate currently flags as UNDEFINED_TERM (System Architect, Native Pattern Thinker, Brain Coherence Report, Managed Deterministic Brain, BaaS HOLD, Sellable NOW...). Clears the open sidecar warnings via point-to-canon + NEEDS_SG_ENTRY queue, dry-scan only.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: the *.language_gate_review.json sidecars (brain-as-a-service x8, auto-heal x3, anti-theater x2) + SOURCEA_DICTIONARY_OVERLAY_v1.md pattern

buildable_ideas.idea: Author the missing 'Brain Coherence Report' deliverable template + scoring rubric (HTML/markdown) with the 7 diagnostic sections brain-audit-v1 names (stack fragmentation, definition drift, agent theater, missing receipts, dead workflows, founder overload, missing decision-spine). Turns the 'sellable NOW, fastest cash path' Tier-1 offer from prose into a repeatable, deliverable artifact.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: brain-audit-v1.md (offer + 7 diagnosis targets) and brain-as-a-service.md Tier-1 honesty anchor

buildable_ideas.idea: Prototype a Tier-1 AI Spend Leak Audit scanner in the sandbox that ingests a mock agent-run/token log and computes the SSOT's defined metrics (leak_rate, cost-per-successful-task, top-5 optimization targets) and emits the promised audit JSON. Proves the cost-governance Tier-1 deliverable on synthetic data without touching any customer infra or CF.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: agentic-cost-governance-SSOT.md ROI metrics table (§3) + agentic-cost-governance-service.md Tier-1 deliverable spec

buildable_ideas.idea: Build the still-pending Signal Factory structural receipt verifier: a JSON schema for the fixed triage receipt + a checker that validates all fixed fields exist, scores are 0-5, risk>=4 sets the human-review routing flag, and author!=subject. Completes the 'worker-build pending' piece behind the already-live signal-factory skill.

Build a static Gateway lead-intelligence dashboard prototype (from the blueprint's DEFERRED list) that reads EXPORTED/mock gateway_leads rows and visualizes priority_tag distribution, venture_route funnel, and lead_type segments. Phase-safe ONLY as a mock/exported-data prototype — do NOT wire it to the live Railway app or Supabase.
